triggers.prompt_regex: \b(index context|index-aware|adaptive index|prior memory|prior decision|what did we decide|why did recall|context packet|query receipt|context view|map artifact|semantic memory|relevant memory|retrieve context)\b

context.directive: Before broad recall or manual fusion, call index_context to assemble a compact GraphQL-backed context packet. Let the product layer use the learned reranker and cache metadata; hydrate only the records the packet justifies.
workflow: Extract intent, entities, project hints, file paths, tool names, and exact ids.
Call index_context with a bounded limit and default cache policy.
Use returned top_context, rank_signals, and provenance as the working set.
Prefer fusion.mode learned_listwise_reranker or learned_cross_encoder_reranker; treat weighted_rrf as a labeled fallback.
Use index_spine only for narrower inspection or degraded-state diagnosis.
Escalate to full hydration only for the top records that are actually needed.
validation_defaults: index_context({"query":"..."}) returns top_context and learned reranker fusion metadata when reranker env is configured
A repeated identical index_context call reports cache.status=hit
